title: MedicationDecision
description: The canonical shape of a MedicationDecision record — docs/56-WPI-11-HOLOSCAN-ARCHITECTURE-FREEZE.md §11.4's append-only clinical-status ledger, Batch WPI-11 (docs/50-PHASE-3-TECHNICAL-PLAN.md §19, ADR-024/025/026), governed by docs/53-PHASE-3-IMPLEMENTATION-RULES.md. Every Continue/Stop/Replace/Unknown action against a MedicationHistory row (medication-history.schema.json) is its own doctor-authored MedicationDecision row — strictly append-only, mirroring InventoryTransaction.gs's own explicit discipline exactly (docs/54 §19). MedicationHistory.current_status is a pure function of the most recent MedicationDecision row for that medication.

decision_id.description: Server-generated UUID (generateFoundationId_()), this row's own identity — never doctor-supplied.

replacement_medication_history_id.description: Populated only when decision_type: 'replace' — references a different, already-existing MedicationHistory row that replaces this one. Disclosed boundary (docs/56 §11.4): the replacement medication must already exist as its own MedicationHistory row before it can be referenced here. Empty-string sentinel otherwise.

notes.description: Optional doctor rationale, empty-string sentinel when not supplied.
